creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #11)

Thanks for the course in the history. Oh wow, MS did a lot of dick moves. This being one of them. They have also been deviating the RFCs for Kerberos. E.g., casing for Kerberos principals which causes a lot of pain. Which fields of RFC 4120 are we talking about?
